nasb.text: If your right eye makes you stumble, tear it out and throw it from you; for it is better for you to lose one of the parts of your body, than for your whole body to be thrown into hell.

esv.text: If your right eye causes you to sin, tear it out and throw it away. For it is better that you lose one of your members than that your whole body be thrown into hell.

cnv.text: 如果你的右眼使你犯罪，就把它挖出來丟掉；寧可失去身體的一部分，勝過全身被丟進地獄裡。

ccb.text: 如果你的右眼使你犯罪，就把它剜掉！宁可失去身体的一部分，也比整个人下地狱好。

csbs.text: 如果你的右眼使你绊倒，就把它剜出来丢掉！因为对你来说，失去你身体的一部分，总比你全身被丢进地狱要好。
